Class SlicingSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
org.key_project.slicing.SlicingSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class SlicingSettings extends AbstractPropertiesSettings
Settings for the proof slicing extension.
